subTitle: Ask us anything about our brand and products, and get factual responses.

faqs.question: What modules are included in the ERP Okanox starter package?
faqs.answer: The starter package includes essential modules for Commercial Management, Sales, Purchasing, and basic inventory, along with SUNAT integration for electronic invoicing.

faqs.question: Can I add more modules to Sakad RMS later?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! The system is fully scalable. You can add modules like Payroll, Advanced Logistics, or Full Accounting at any time as your business grows.

faqs.question: What kind of customer support can I expect?
faqs.answer: All our customers receive dedicated support. We provide technical assistance via WhatsApp and email to resolve operational and technical queries quickly.

faqs.question: How are SUNAT updates handled?
faqs.answer: Our software is automatically updated with every regulatory change from SUNAT. You don't have to worry about legal changes; we ensure your invoicing is always valid.

faqs.question: Are the tutorials and help resources up to date?
faqs.answer: We constantly update our knowledge base with step-by-step guides and videos on the use of each module so your team always knows how to get the most out of the system.

faqs.question: Do you offer solutions for companies with multiple locations?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Enterprise solutions allow you to manage multiple locations, warehouses, and points of sale centrally and in real-time from anywhere.
